name: Nebraska
why_ruby_pro: NLCC licensing compliance built into every account, route, and delivery
Nebraska Revised Statutes Chapter 53 excise tax calculations automated on all transactions
Local option wet/dry territory rules enforced automatically across all Nebraska routes
problem: NLCC license classes and local option territory rules tracked manually across accounts
Chapter 53 excise filings assembled from disconnected spreadsheets each period
Keg registration requirements and local option elections creating compliance gaps
difference: Auto-enforce NLCC license restrictions and local option rules on every order
Built-in Chapter 53 excise reporting directly from your live transaction data
Handle keg registration and local option compliance without extra administrative work
how_it_works: Every account tagged with NLCC license class and local option status automatically
One-click Chapter 53 excise reports generated from actual orders and inventory
See route profitability and account health across all Nebraska territories
